# full

Redis server, compression, sentinel hosts/master, and db

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/redis/full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  redis.server: argocd-redis-ha-haproxy:6379
  redis.compression: gzip
  redis.sentinel.hosts: argocd-redis-ha-announce-0:26379,argocd-redis-ha-announce-1:26379,argocd-redis-ha-announce-2:26379
  redis.sentinel.master: argocd
  redis.db: "0"
  redis.key.prefix: argocd
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  redis:
    compression: gzip
    db: 0
    keyPrefix: argocd
    sentinel:
      hosts:
      - argocd-redis-ha-announce-0:26379
      - argocd-redis-ha-announce-1:26379
      - argocd-redis-ha-announce-2:26379
      master: argocd
    server: argocd-redis-ha-haproxy:6379
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  redis.compression: gzip
  redis.db: "0"
  redis.key.prefix: argocd
  redis.sentinel.hosts: argocd-redis-ha-announce-0:26379,argocd-redis-ha-announce-1:26379,argocd-redis-ha-announce-2:26379
  redis.sentinel.master: argocd
  redis.server: argocd-redis-ha-haproxy:6379
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
